ESLint parser, plugin, and rule set for GraphQL (for schema and operations). Easily customizable with custom rules. Integrates with IDEs and modern GraphQL tools.
A tool for generating code based on a GraphQL schema and GraphQL operations (query/mutation/subscription), with flexible support for custom plugins.

JLine is a Java library for handling console input.
Joda-Time is the widely used replacement for the Java date and time classes prior to Java SE 8.
A utility to compile browserslist query to a RegExp to test browser useragent.
Backport of functionality based on JSR-310 to Java SE 6 and 7. This is NOT an implementation of JSR-310.
